name: Source Fidelity review for Validity Conditions Claim Hardening Update bundle
summary: Accepted. This bundle only adds already-published, full-text-reviewed validity-condition sources and findings to existing claim support maps; it does not introduce new bibliographic extraction.

findings.claim_or_issue: The added support IDs all point to sources/findings published in the immediately preceding validity-condition bundle.
findings.why_it_matters: Claim-support hardening should not silently introduce unreviewed literature.
findings.recommended_action: Keep the source IDs and finding IDs limited to the published validity-condition records.
